g.title: XDRV
g.text: 18-50 VDC. Common-cathode signal: Mega D5/D7/D6 drive PUL+/DIR+/ENBL+; PUL-/DIR-/ENBL- jumpered to Mega GND. DIP SW1-8 = ON OFF ON OFF ON OFF OFF ON = 16 microstep (3200 pulse/rev); SW4 OFF = half current at standstill; phase current (SW1-3) TBD. EN active-LOW (firmware).

g.title: YDRV
g.text: 18-50 VDC. Common-cathode signal: Mega D8/D10/D9 drive PUL+/DIR+/ENBL+; PUL-/DIR-/ENBL- jumpered to Mega GND. DIP SW1-8 = ON OFF OFF OFF ON OFF OFF ON = 16 microstep (3200 pulse/rev); SW4 OFF = half current at standstill; phase current (SW1-3) TBD. EN active-LOW (firmware).

g.title: PSU
g.text: AC 110/220 V in; DC out 24 V / 15 A (360 W). Feeds both driver DC buses.

g.title: MOTOR_X
g.text: StepperOnline NEMA 17, 2.0 A/phase, 59 Ncm (84 oz-in), 48 mm, 4-lead (17HS19-2004S1). Coil A = A+ black / A- green; coil B = B+ red / B- blue. Drives the camera carriage. (+/- order only affects direction.)

g.title: MOTOR_Y
g.text: Same StepperOnline NEMA 17 2.0 A/phase as X (17HS19-2004S1). Coil A = A+ black / A- green; coil B = B+ red / B- blue. GT2 belt drive.

g.title: PIX_H
g.text: INPUT_PULLUP; OUT reads LOW when the slot is blocked

g.title: PIX_V
g.text: INPUT_PULLUP; OUT reads LOW when the slot is blocked

g.title: CAM
g.text: ~50 ms HIGH pulse fires capture (shorter is ignored)

g.title: RELAYS
g.text: active-LOW; IN1 = shelf 1 … IN6 = shelf 6. Coil supply (JD-VCC) external — see TODO.
